note: seq=65 (THROUGHPUT EXPORTER -- investor 'Throughput & Ceiling' data layer, TRUTHFUL). Publishes status/hetzner/throughput.json every 1 min with INTAKE vs ENRICHMENT split, each per-minute/hour/day + MONTH-TO-DATE, computed from TIMESTAMPED counter deltas (NOT the misleading last-writer enriched_per_min field), plus the ramp-measured per-box CEILING (Hetzner enrich ~1,957/min ~2.8M/day, DB-write/queue-bound). Per-box HONESTY: intake is Hetzner-only (collectors run here); InterServer enrich isn't cleanly isolable (queue clears locked_by on done) so it's shown by live pg-connection presence + marked 'measuring', never guessed. The exporter persists /var/lib/atlas/throughput/state.json for deltas+MTD and runs on a 1-min timer with the STATUS_* publish creds captured into 0600 /etc/atlas/throughput.env. selftest PASS (rate + MTD math). The WP Bridge / PWA snapshot read this. Allowlist-safe.

steps.note: seq=65: truthful throughput exporter -> throughput.json (intake/enrich per box, per-min/hr/day/MTD + ceiling).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_throughput.py':'b440576dedeb8a149dcfe8af9db9cec83279af198cae1a98829faa5790495835'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS throughput exporter (truthful intake vs enrich, per-min/hr/day/MTD + ceilings)
After=network-online.target postgresql.service

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/throughput.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_throughput.py
TimeoutStartSec=60

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS throughput exporter every 1 min (live climbing investor numbers)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=1min
OnUnitActiveSec=1min
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-throughput.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/throughput.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/throughput.env',0o600); import subprocess as s; s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-throughput.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-throughput.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-throughput.service']); print('throughput exporter started (1-min timer)')"
